title: zygogynum howeanum
intro: Zygogynum howeanum, a species of flowering plant in the family Winteraceae, is native to New Caledonia. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its bark, which is used to treat various health conditions. The bark of Zygogynum howeanum has been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it is also believed to have anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to reduce pain and inflammation. In terms of herbal preparations, the bark can be dried and used to make tea or infused in oil to create a topical treatment for various health issues.
